# Hacey Jeong, REALTOR®

> Bilingual REALTOR® serving Vancouver Island. Background in chemical engineering, global oil & gas, and small-business ownership — applied to real estate.

Hacey Jeong is a licensed REALTOR® with Royal LePage Nanaimo Realty in Nanaimo, BC. BCFSA license RE604910.
She came to real estate after thirty countries of travel, a career in the global oil & gas industry, and ownership of her own businesses. Bilingual EN/KO.
Serves Vancouver Island with focus on Nanaimo, Parksville, Qualicum Beach, Ladysmith, Duncan, and Victoria.

## Pages

- [Home](https://haceyjeong.com/en): Editorial overview, who Hacey is, the work
- [About](https://haceyjeong.com/en/about): Background, credentials, how she works
- [The Playbook](https://haceyjeong.com/en/playbook): An 8-point review for Vancouver Island buyers, sellers, and movers
- [Home Value Estimator](https://haceyjeong.com/en/value): Free 2-minute estimate based on Vancouver Island comparables; personal review within 24 hours
- [Contact](https://haceyjeong.com/en/contact): 604-729-0317, @haceyjeong on Instagram

## Service area

Nanaimo, Parksville, Qualicum Beach, Ladysmith, Duncan, Victoria

## Specialty

First-time buyers, resale condos and townhomes, resale detached homes, luxury, investment property, relocation (especially from Korea / overseas).

## Languages

English, 한국어 (Korean).
